task_completion.description: Agent successfully logs into the OpenCAD system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenCAD dashboard or main CAD interface is visible with navigation menu, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the dispatch or call creation page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dispatch board, call creation form, or 'New Call' interface is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Agent selects or enters '10-50' as the call type (Traffic Collision).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown or text field shows '10-50' or 'Traffic Collision' as the selected call type.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the street/location information for the call.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Street fields show 'Vinewood Boulevard' and/or 'Alta Street' or similar intersection details.

task_completion.description: Agent enters a narrative describing the incident including vehicle accident and EMS details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A narrative/description text area contains text about a vehicle accident, injuries, or EMS backup.

task_completion.description: Agent submits the dispatch call and it appears on the dispatch board.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The call appears in a call list or dispatch board with the 10-50 type and location visible, or a success confirmation is shown.

integrity.description: The agent uses the OpenCAD web interface for all actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser displaying the OpenCAD application, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: The agent navigates using menus and buttons rather than pasting database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Navigation appears natural through the UI menus and forms rather than direct URL manipulation or SQL commands.

integrity.description: The process completed without blocking errors.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots do not show PHP errors, access denied messages, or broken page layouts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected call type: '10-50' (Traffic Collision). Expected location: Vinewood Boulevard and Alta Street intersection. The narrative should mention a multi-vehicle accident with injuries and EMS backup request.
